case_title: CHASE BANK USA, N.A. VS. MIRION T. LOWRY

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION JANALIE HENRIQUES FILED RE: INTEREST, COSTS (CCP 1033) AND ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A.
